ATL.note: Many expiring contracts; hard-capped at 1st apron; aiming for flexibility/big trade; young core.

BOS.note: Tatum healthy return; competitive team; likely over cap, managing aprons; buyer for upgrades.

BKN.note: Historically aggressive in trades; cap status unclear; potential for roster changes.

CHA.note: Ample cap space, many draft picks, young core; hard-capped at 1st apron; poised for future transactions.

CHI.note: Significant cap space, young core, draft picks; not hard-capped; poised for major roster changes.

CLE.note: Above second apron; expensive core; very limited flexibility; internal improvement is key.

DET.note: Young core (Cunningham, Thompson, Duren); hard-capped at 1st apron; mid-tier contracts for trades.

IND.note: Haliburton healthy return; slightly into 1st apron; willing to pay tax; some flexibility.

MIA.note: Giannis acquired; hard-capped at 1st apron; some young talent; limited major free agency.

MIL.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron; significant dead money from Lillard; roster changes post-Giannis.

NYK.note: Above 1st apron, near 2nd; owner opposes 2nd apron; limited exceptions; buyer for upgrades.

ORL.note: Very expensive roster; above 1st apron, near 2nd; limited flexibility; internal development key.

PHI.note: Capped out with Embiid, George, Maxey max deals; limited flexibility; likely near 1st apron.

TOR.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron; expensive core (Kawhi, Barnes, Ingram); limited flexibility; potential seller.

WAS.note: Rebuilding with #1 pick AJ Dybantsa; likely cap room; future-focused; seller/developer.

DAL.note: Anthony Davis acquired; competitive team; likely over cap, managing aprons; buyer for upgrades.

DEN.note: Contending team; limited cap flexibility; likely stand-pat at deadline.

GSW.note: Capped out with aging stars; limited flexibility; expected hard-capped at 2nd apron.

HOU.note: Building team; likely cap room and flexibility; buyer for young talent.

LAC.note: Significant cap flexibility; Beal injury; young assets acquired; potential for big moves.

LAL.note: Luka Doncic era; close to 1st apron; limited flexibility; buyer for upgrades.

MEM.note: Significant room below 1st apron; flexibility for moves; likely young core.

MIN.note: Expensive core (Edwards, Ball, Gobert); near 2nd apron; limited flexibility; DiVincenzo injury.

NOP.note: Hard-capped; limited flexibility for roster changes.

OKC.note: Over second apron; three max players; rely on internal development, draft; Hartenstein/Dort trade chips.

PHX.note: Contending team; limited cap flexibility; likely stand-pat at deadline.

POR.note: Over cap with Morant, Holiday, Lillard (Achilles); young core developing; positioned for consolidation trades.

SAC.note: Competitive team; some flexibility; likely over cap, managing aprons; buyer for upgrades.

SAS.note: Young core (Wemby, Castle, Harper) on rookie deals; hard-capped at 1st apron; high upside.

UTA.note: Rebuilding team; likely cap room and draft assets; future-focused.
